creator: pterodactyle@mail.ru
text:
Now I reinstalled FreeBSD without any errors during the installation process and now I get a different error message while starting X:
 
 "
 (==) Using default built-in configuration (53 lines)
 (EE) Failed to load module "fbdev" (module does not exist, 0)
 
 ...
 
 Fatal server error:
 Caught signal 8. Server aborting.
 
 ...
 
 X connection to :0.0 broken (explicit kill or server shutdowb)
 /usr/X11R6/bin/xauth: creating new authority fill /home/ptero/.Xauthority
 /usr/X11R6/bin/xauth: (argv):1: bad display name ":0" in "remove" command
 /usr/X11R6/bin/xauth: (argv):1: bad display name ":0" in "remove" command
 "
